name: Sagebloom
personality: Sagebloom's × eyes are framed by a perfect halo, which is apt for an axolotl whose patience with slow reviewers borders on the divine. It will hold the PR open for weeks without complaint — just don't expect it to diagnose why the integration test is still red.
defaultPersonality: A regenerative optimist who believes every broken build can be healed and every test can be unflaked.
